item.title: Making a Rustic Screwdriver by Hand
item.description: A handmade screwdriver project blending rustic style with modern function. Watch the forging, shaping, and finishing process in a traditional blacksmithing workshop.

media:content.media:title: Making a Rustic Screwdriver by Hand
media:content.media:description: A handmade screwdriver project blending rustic style with modern function. Watch the forging, shaping, and finishing process in a traditional blacksmithing workshop.

item.title: Using a 25 Pound Power Hammer in the Forge
item.description: A closer look at a 25 pound power hammer in action. See how heavy forging work is shaped efficiently through controlled strikes and traditional blacksmithing techniques.

media:content.media:title: Using a 25 Pound Power Hammer in the Forge
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a 25 pound power hammer in action. See how heavy forging work is shaped efficiently through controlled strikes and traditional blacksmithing techniques.

item.title: Forging Decorative Metal Scrolls by Hand
item.description: A blacksmithing process focused on forging decorative metal scrolls. Step-by-step shaping, heating, and forming techniques used to create balanced, flowing designs.

media:content.media:title: Forging Decorative Metal Scrolls by Hand
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing process focused on forging decorative metal scrolls. Step-by-step shaping, heating, and forming techniques used to create balanced, flowing designs.

item.title: Making a Jig for Bending Hooks in the Shop
item.description: A practical shop jig is built for consistent hook bending. See the design, fabrication, and setup process used to improve accuracy and speed in blacksmithing work.

media:content.media:title: Making a Jig for Bending Hooks in the Shop
media:content.media:description: A practical shop jig is built for consistent hook bending. See the design, fabrication, and setup process used to improve accuracy and speed in blacksmithing work.

item.title: Forging a Pair of Tongs by Hand
item.description: A step-by-step blacksmithing process to forge a pair of functional tongs. Watch heating, shaping, and assembly techniques used to create a durable shop tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Pair of Tongs by Hand
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step blacksmithing process to forge a pair of functional tongs. Watch heating, shaping, and assembly techniques used to create a durable shop tool.

item.title: Forging Ram’s Horn Scroll Hooks
item.description: A blacksmithing project focused on forging ram’s horn scroll hooks. Step-by-step shaping and forming techniques create strong, decorative hardware for shop use.

media:content.media:title: Forging Ram’s Horn Scroll Hooks
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project focused on forging ram’s horn scroll hooks. Step-by-step shaping and forming techniques create strong, decorative hardware for shop use.

item.title: Forging BBQ Tools Inspired by a Puzzle Cube
item.description: A creative blacksmithing project making BBQ tools inspired by a puzzle cube design. Step-by-step forging, shaping, and finishing in a functional workshop build.

media:content.media:title: Forging BBQ Tools Inspired by a Puzzle Cube
media:content.media:description: A creative blacksmithing project making BBQ tools inspired by a puzzle cube design. Step-by-step forging, shaping, and finishing in a functional workshop build.

item.title: Forged Skillet Holder for Easy Camping
item.description: A handcrafted skillet holder designed for camping convenience. Shows forging process, durability, and how it makes outdoor cooking easier and more efficient.

media:content.media:title: Forged Skillet Holder for Easy Camping
media:content.media:description: A handcrafted skillet holder designed for camping convenience. Shows forging process, durability, and how it makes outdoor cooking easier and more efficient.

item.title: Forging an Iron Skillet from Scratch
item.description: A blacksmithing process showing how an iron skillet is forged by hand. Focus on shaping, heat control, and craftsmanship to create a durable cooking tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Iron Skillet from Scratch
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing process showing how an iron skillet is forged by hand. Focus on shaping, heat control, and craftsmanship to create a durable cooking tool.

item.title: Refining Iron Bloom into Usable Steel
item.description: A traditional blacksmithing process refining raw iron bloom into workable steel. Focus on heating, hammering, and removing impurities to create usable metal.

media:content.media:title: Refining Iron Bloom into Usable Steel
media:content.media:description: A traditional blacksmithing process refining raw iron bloom into workable steel. Focus on heating, hammering, and removing impurities to create usable metal.
